name: Abdelrahman Alaa Eldeen
title: Data Scientist & Software Engineer
bio: Junior Software Engineer and Data Scientist with over 1 year of experience in Python, SQL, Java, and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure). Hands-on experience in building scalable data-driven systems, analytics pipelines, and enterprise-level applications. Strong background in machine learning, data modeling, logging systems, and automation with a passion for transforming data into business value.
shortBio: Passionate about transforming data into business value through innovative software solutions and machine learning.
